qc_feedback: - Non-Failing Issues: • [Non-Fail - Outcome-Light] Outcome criteria account for at least 50%, but less than 80% of the criteria present (56,25 %). • [Non-Fail - Up to 15% Moderate Errors] ◦  [Overly Broad Criteria] [C#17] [C#18] Rubric 17 and 18 are overly broad.
